entries.title: The Beginning
entries.body: Cameron and Sophie stepped aboard Juno's 7 to begin their first season working together on the same yacht. A marina webcam captured the moment they boarded for the first time.

entries.title: First Days on Deck
entries.quote: Giving the sun deck black some love.
entries.body: The first days aboard quickly settled into the rhythm of deck work: cleaning, polishing and looking after the exterior surfaces that make the yacht appear effortless.

entries.title: Still Filthy
entries.quote: Spent the last 3 days cleaning the thing and tbh, still filthy.
entries.body: A perfectly honest summary of life on deck: however beautiful the setting, salt, sun and dust never stop working against the crew.

entries.title: Rather Rocky
entries.body: A livelier passage gave the Mediterranean some character.

entries.title: Sophie's First Jet Ski
entries.body: The captain invited Cameron to take Sophie out on a jet ski. It became Sophie's first time on one.

entries.title: My Future House
entries.body: Passing a beautiful hillside house above the water, Sophie captured one of those light-hearted travel moments.

entries.title: Nice Spot for Today
entries.body: A quiet anchorage surrounded by clear water and green hills.
